title: Ayahuasca: Vine of the Soul
original_title: Vine of the Soul: Encounters with Ayahuasca
overview: On a quest for emotional healing and spiritual awakening, a naturopathic doctor and an accountant join others in the Peruvian Amazon to drink a psychedelic brew called ayahuasca.
